zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles於1087年9月1日出生在英國林可爾史爾維爾時，他的父親Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell22歲，母親Meredith verch Myrrdin23歲。他和Amaranth Delincoln至少有3個兒子。他去世於1118年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles于1087年9月1日出生在英国林可爾史爾維爾时，他的父亲Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell22岁，母亲Meredith verch Myrrdin23岁。他和Amaranth Delincoln至少有3个儿子。他去世于1118年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: DeWelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Amedee, Camille, Cecile, Philippe.

variants.name: Decelle
meanings: French: topographic name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone who lived near a monk's hermitage, celle (from ecclesiastic Latin cella ‘cell, hermitage’); or a habitational name for someone from Celle, the name of several places in various parts of France, named with this word. Compare Decelles and Sault .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles was born on 1 September 1087, in Well, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell, was 22 and his mother, Meredith verch Myrrdin, was 23. He had at least 3 sons with Amaranth Delincoln. He died in 1118, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles est né le 1 septembre 1087, à Well, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Meredith verch Myrrdin, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Amaranth Delincoln. Il est décédé en 1118, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles am 1. September 1087 in Well, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell 22 und seine Mutter Meredith verch Myrrdin 23. Er hatte mit Amaranth Delincoln mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1118 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles è nato il il 1 settembre 1087 nel Well, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Meredith verch Myrrdin, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Amaranth Delincoln. Morì nel 1118, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWellesが1087年9月1日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエルで生まれた時，父Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewellは22歳，母Meredith verch Myrrdinは23歳であった。彼はAmaranth Delincolnとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1118年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles(이)가 1087년 9월 1일 영국 링코실르 웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Meredith verch Myrrdin(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Amaranth Delincoln(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1118년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles nasceu em 1 de setembro de 1087, em Well, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Meredith verch Myrrdin, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Amaranth Delincoln. Ele faleceu em 1118, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles родился 1 сентября 1087 г. в местности велл, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Meredith verch Myrrdin, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Amaranth Delincoln. Он умер в 1118 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles nació el 1 de septiembre de 1087, en Well, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Meredith verch Myrrdin, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Amaranth Delincoln. Murió en 1118, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
